feedback.text: Please consider adding video games to be part of this. It is unfortunately becoming more and more common to have video games built with planned obsolescence in mind. This does not mean online only games, but games that have no reason to stop being playable after game studio/publisher has decided to move on. I consider this extremely hostile against consumer rights and would compare it to a situation where you buy book, but seller would one day take that book back without giving you refund.
